title: Carry out advanced gas metal arc welding on vehicle body sections
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out advanced gas metal arc welding on vehicle body sections demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan and prepare to carry out advanced GMAW

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret welding information1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for welding and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret welding information1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for welding and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret welding information1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for welding and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan and prepare to carry out advanced GMAW

elements.title: Weld using GMAW welder

pcs.text: Set up and make adjustments to welding equipment according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Carry out welding test runs according to workplace procedures2.3 Weld materials using GMAW process according to workplace procedures and required specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set up and make adjustments to welding equipment according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Carry out welding test runs according to workplace procedures2.3 Weld materials using GMAW process according to workplace procedures and required specifications?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Weld using GMAW welder

elements.title: Check welds

pcs.text: Clean welds are according to workplace procedures3.2 Carry out visual inspection and destructive testing and confirm weld quality and specifications3.3 Identify weld defects and prepare for re-welding as required, notifying appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean welds are according to workplace procedures3.2 Carry out visual inspection and destructive testing and confirm weld quality and specifications3.3 Identify weld defects and prepare for re-welding as required, notifying appropriate personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean welds are according to workplace procedures3.2 Carry out visual inspection and destructive testing and confirm weld quality and specifications3.3 Identify weld defects and prepare for re-welding as required, notifying appropriate personnel.

elements.title: Complete work processes
